elements.text: You're in the car with friends on your way to a weekend trip, and you wonder whether you locked your front door. You usually lock the door, but you still feel anxious not knowing for sure. You think your weekend away from home will be...

elements.name: locked_door--academics_work_career_development--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
